samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="size">4</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    <task>
        <description>Extend input signals.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="extension_a">{{size{1'b0}}, mul_a};</assign>
            <assign name="extension_b">{{size{1'b0}}, mul_b};</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <assign name="partial_products[0]">extension_a & {(32){extension_b[0]}};</assign>
    <assign name="partial_products[1]">extension_a & {(32){extension_b[1]}};</assign>
    <assign name="partial_products[2]">extension_a & {(32){extension_b[2]}};</assign>
    <assign name="partial_products[3]">extension_a & {(32){extension_b[3]}};</assign>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate sum of partial products.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="sum[0]">partial_products[0][3:0];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[1]">partial_products[1][3:0] + partial_products[0][4:1];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[2]">partial_products[2][3:0] + partial_products[1][4:2] + partial_products[0][5:2];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[3]">partial_products[3][3:0] + partial_products[2][4:3] + partial_products[1][5:4] + partial_products[0][6:4];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[4]">partial_products[3][4:1] + partial_products[2][5:4] + partial_products[1][6:5] + partial_products[0][7:6];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[5]">partial_products[3][5:2] + partial_products[2][6:5] + partial_products[1][7:6];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[6]">partial_products[3][6:3] + partial_products[2][7:6];</assign>
            <assign name="sum[7]">partial_products[3][7:4];</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate multiplication result.</description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="mul_out">sum[0] + (sum[1] << 1) + (sum[2] << 2) + (sum[3] << 3) + (sum[4] << 4) + (sum[5] << 5) + (sum[6] << 6) + (sum[7] << 7);</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    </implementation>
</module>
